rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"When @kody decompose detects complexity_score < 4 or a non-decomposable task, it delegates to the normal pipeline — no special handling needed.","scope":"kody decompose"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Co-located vitest tests use .test.ts suffix next to their source file, matching src/utils/ patterns like debounce.ts / debounce.test.ts.","scope":"src/utils"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Low-risk, purely additive features (new files only) are classified as simple tasks and skip decomposition.","scope":"kody decompose"}]}
